mapper.sql: homepage_id, cm_idx, start_date, start_time, end_date, end_time, title, contents, date_type, link_url, weekday, individual_yn
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM CMS_CALENDAR_MANAGE WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id}
AND (substr(start_date,1,7) = #{plan_date} OR substr(end_date,1,7) = #{plan_date})
AND DELETE_YN = 'N'

SELECT homepage_id, cm_idx, start_date, start_time, end_date, end_time, title, contents, date_type, link_url, individual_yn, group_idx, CASE WHEN weekday = '1,2,3,4,5,6,7' THEN '0' ELSE weekday END weekday, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_CALENDAR_MANAGE B WHERE b.group_idx = a.group_idx) as group_count FROM CMS_CALENDAR_MANAGE a WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND CM_IDX = #{cm_idx} AND DATE_TYPE = #{date_type} AND DELETE_YN = 'N'

SELECT MIN(start_date) AS start_date, MAX(end_date) AS end_date, MIN(start_time) AS start_time, MAX(end_time) AS end_time FROM CMS_CALENDAR_MANAGE a WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND DATE_TYPE = #{date_type} AND group_idx = #{group_idx} AND DELETE_YN = 'N'

SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(START_DATE,'YYYY-MM-DD'),'YYYY-MM-DD') AS START_DATE, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(END_DATE,'YYYY-MM-DD'),'YYYY-MM-DD') AS END_DATE, homepage_id, cm_idx, start_time, end_time, title, contents, date_type, link_url FROM CMS_CALENDAR_MANAGE WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND DATE_TYPE = '1' AND DELETE_YN = 'N'
AND (substr(start_date,1,7) = #{plan_date} OR substr(end_date,1,7) = #{plan_date})

SELECT mm, LISTAGG(dd,', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY mm, dd) AS dd FROM ( SELECT substr(start_date,6,2) as mm, substr(start_date,9,2) as dd FROM ( SELECT distinct start_date FROM CMS_CALENDAR_MANAGE WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND date_type = '1' AND DELETE_YN = 'N' AND substr(start_date,1,7) = #{plan_date} ) ORDER BY DD ) GROUP BY mm

SELECT mm, LISTAGG(dd,', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY mm, dd) AS dd FROM ( SELECT substr(start_date,6,2) as mm, substr(start_date,9,2) || '(' || to_char(to_date(start_date),'dy') || ')' as dd FROM ( SELECT distinct start_date FROM CMS_CALENDAR_MANAGE WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND date_type = '1' AND DELETE_YN = 'N' AND substr(start_date,1,7) = #{plan_date} ) ORDER BY DD ) GROUP BY mm

SELECT
FROM CMS_CALENDAR_MANAGE WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND date_type IN ('2','3','4')
AND (substr(start_date,1,7) = #{plan_date} OR substr(end_date,1,7) = #{plan_date})
AND DELETE_YN = 'N'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_CALENDAR_MANAGE WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND DATE_TYPE = '1' AND DELETE_YN = 'N' AND START_DATE <= #{end_date} AND END_DATE >= #{start_date}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_CALENDAR_MANAGE WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND DATE_TYPE = '1' AND DELETE_YN = 'N' AND START_DATE = #{start_date}

SELECT MIN(DECODE(TO_CHAR(DAYS, 'D'), 1, TO_CHAR(DAYS, 'FMDD'))) AS SUN, MIN(DECODE(TO_CHAR(DAYS, 'D'), 2, TO_CHAR(DAYS, 'FMDD'))) AS MON, MIN(DECODE(TO_CHAR(DAYS, 'D'), 3, TO_CHAR(DAYS, 'FMDD'))) AS TUE, MIN(DECODE(TO_CHAR(DAYS, 'D'), 4, TO_CHAR(DAYS, 'FMDD'))) AS WED, MIN(DECODE(TO_CHAR(DAYS, 'D'), 5, TO_CHAR(DAYS, 'FMDD'))) AS THU, MIN(DECODE(TO_CHAR(DAYS, 'D'), 6, TO_CHAR(DAYS, 'FMDD'))) AS FRI, MIN(DECODE(TO_CHAR(DAYS, 'D'), 7, TO_CHAR(DAYS, 'FMDD'))) AS SAT, #{plan_date} AS PLAN_DATE FROM ( SELECT (BASE_MON + LEVEL - 1) AS DAYS, BASE_MON, ((TRUNC(BASE_MON + LEVEL - 1, 'D') - TRUNC(TRUNC(BASE_MON + LEVEL - 1, 'Y'), 'D')) / 7 + 1) AS WEEK_NUM FROM (SELECT TO_DATE(#{plan_date}, 'yyyy-MM') AS BASE_MON FROM DUAL) CONNECT BY LEVEL <= LAST_DAY(TO_DATE(#{plan_date}, 'yyyy-MM')) - TO_DATE(#{plan_date}, 'yyyy-MM') + 1 ) WHERE DAYS <= LAST_DAY(BASE_MON) GROUP BY WEEK_NUM ORDER BY WEEK_NUM

SELECT DAYS AS dd, WEEKDAY, #{plan_date} AS PLAN_DATE FROM ( SELECT TO_CHAR(DAYS, 'FMDD') AS DAYS, CASE WHEN TO_CHAR(DAYS, 'D') = '1' THEN '일' WHEN TO_CHAR(DAYS, 'D') = '2' THEN '월' WHEN TO_CHAR(DAYS, 'D') = '3' THEN '화' WHEN TO_CHAR(DAYS, 'D') = '4' THEN '수' WHEN TO_CHAR(DAYS, 'D') = '5' THEN '목' WHEN TO_CHAR(DAYS, 'D') = '6' THEN '금' WHEN TO_CHAR(DAYS, 'D') = '7' THEN '토' END AS WEEKDAY FROM ( SELECT (BASE_MON + LEVEL - 1) AS DAYS, BASE_MON, ((TRUNC(BASE_MON + LEVEL - 1, 'D') - TRUNC(TRUNC(BASE_MON + LEVEL - 1, 'Y'), 'D')) / 7 + 1) AS WEEK_NUM FROM (SELECT TO_DATE(#{plan_date}, 'yyyy-MM') AS BASE_MON FROM DUAL) CONNECT BY LEVEL <= LAST_DAY(TO_DATE(#{plan_date}, 'yyyy-MM')) - TO_DATE(#{plan_date}, 'yyyy-MM') + 1 ) WHERE DAYS <= LAST_DAY(BASE_MON) )

SELECT C.*, TO_CHAR(C.DAYS, 'D') AS WEEKDAY, #{plan_date} AS PLAN_DATE FROM ( SELECT (BASE_MON + LEVEL - 1) AS DAYS, BASE_MON, ((TRUNC(BASE_MON + LEVEL - 1, 'D') - TRUNC(TRUNC(BASE_MON + LEVEL - 1, 'Y'), 'D')) / 7 + 1) AS WEEK_NUM FROM (SELECT TO_DATE(#{plan_date}, 'yyyy-MM') AS BASE_MON FROM DUAL) CONNECT BY LEVEL <= LAST_DAY(TO_DATE(#{plan_date}, 'yyyy-MM')) - TO_DATE(#{plan_date}, 'yyyy-MM') + 1 ) C WHERE C.DAYS <= LAST_DAY(BASE_MON)

SELECT TO_CHAR(START_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS START_DATE, SUM(COUNT) AS COUNT FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT(START_DATE + LEVEL -1) AS START_DATE, COUNT FROM ( SELECT TO_DATE(START_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS START_DATE, TO_DATE(END_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS END_DATE, COUNT(*) AS COUNT FROM CMS_CALENDAR_MANAGE WHERE DELETE_YN = 'N' AND HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} GROUP BY START_DATE, END_DATE ) CONNECT BY START_DATE + LEVEL -1 <= END_DATE order by start_date desc ) WHERE START_DATE BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{start_date},'yyyy-mm-dd') AND TO_DATE(#{end_date}, 'yyyy-mm-dd') GROUP BY ROLLUP (START_DATE ) ORDER BY START_DATE DESC

SELECT START_DATE, SUM(COUNT) AS COUNT FROM ( SELECT TO_CHAR(START_DATE, 'YYYY-MM') AS START_DATE, SUM(COUNT) AS COUNT FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT(START_DATE + LEVEL -1) AS START_DATE, COUNT FROM ( SELECT TO_DATE(START_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS START_DATE, TO_DATE(END_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS END_DATE, COUNT(*) AS COUNT FROM CMS_CALENDAR_MANAGE WHERE DELETE_YN = 'N' AND HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} GROUP BY START_DATE, END_DATE ) CONNECT BY START_DATE + LEVEL -1 <= END_DATE order by start_date desc ) WHERE TO_CHAR(START_DATE,'YYYY') = #{start_year} GROUP BY ROLLUP (START_DATE) ) GROUP BY START_DATE, COUNT ORDER BY START_DATE DESC

SELECT START_DATE, SUM(COUNT) AS COUNT FROM ( SELECT TO_CHAR(START_DATE, 'YYYY') AS START_DATE, SUM(COUNT) AS COUNT FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT(START_DATE + LEVEL -1) AS START_DATE, COUNT FROM ( SELECT TO_DATE(START_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS START_DATE, TO_DATE(END_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS END_DATE, COUNT(*) AS COUNT FROM CMS_CALENDAR_MANAGE WHERE DELETE_YN = 'N' AND HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} GROUP BY START_DATE, END_DATE ) CONNECT BY START_DATE + LEVEL -1 <= END_DATE order by start_date desc ) WHERE TO_CHAR(START_DATE,'YYYY') BETWEEN #{start_year} and #{end_year} GROUP BY START_DATE ) GROUP BY ROLLUP (START_DATE) ORDER BY START_DATE DESC
SELECT NVL(MAX(cm_idx),0)+1 FROM CMS_CALENDAR_MANAGE
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_CALENDAR_MANAGE WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND group_idx = #{group_idx}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_CALENDAR_MANAGE WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND DATE_TYPE = '1' AND DELETE_YN = 'N' AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') BETWEEN start_date AND end_date

SELECT
FROM CMS_CALENDAR_MANAGE WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND DATE_TYPE = '1' AND DELETE_YN = 'N' AND START_DATE = #{plan_date}

SELECT mm, dd FROM ( SELECT substr(start_date,6,2) as mm, substr(start_date,9,2) as dd FROM ( SELECT distinct start_date FROM CMS_CALENDAR_MANAGE WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND date_type = '1' AND DELETE_YN = 'N' AND substr(start_date,1,7) = #{plan_date} ) ORDER BY DD )

SELECT
FROM CMS_CALENDAR_MANAGE WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id}
AND (substr(start_date,1,7) = #{plan_date} OR substr(end_date,1,7) = #{plan_date})
AND DELETE_YN = 'N' AND date_type !='1'

SELECT
FROM CMS_CALENDAR_MANAGE WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id}
AND (substr(start_date,1,10) = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') OR substr(end_date,1,10) = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD'))
AND DELETE_YN = 'N' AND date_type !='1'

SELECT
FROM CMS_CALENDAR_MANAGE WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND DELETE_YN = 'N' AND START_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{start_date}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND START_DATE < TO_DATE(#{end_date}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
